title: MMV - Moog's Missing Villages
description: This is a mod which adds in the missing jungle and swamp villages in a vanilla friendly way and style
body:
![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_header.webp) [![Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D8LKA5N) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/869218732650688543?color=f7941f&label=DISCORD&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.com/invite/S5nffJbuvA) [![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-projects-f7941f?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/finndog_123/projects) [![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-projects-f7941f?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/FinnDog_123) ![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_overview.webp) This Mod works for Forge, Fabric, NeoForge, and Quilt! It can also be installed server-side only. Forge support was dropped after 1.20.4 ## This mod is INCOMPATIBLE with TERRALITH! ### ABOUT Moogs Missing Villages adds vanilla-styled villages for both the jungle and swamp biomes. It's designed to be as close to what we believe Mojang would have created, had they made these villages. To see the villages, head to the [previews website](https://previews.moogsmods.com/missing-villages/1.21.1/). [![MinecraftStorage](https://imgur.com/ApCtgr7.png)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/mmv-moogs-missing-villages) ![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_features.webp) ![collage](https://pub-24a4e0e7ea8544a5b6f73c3a23512589.r2.dev/images/1ed547f7829847cfafee9ae5919d26ea.png) ![showcase](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_showcase.webp) ### VIDEOS
### MODPACKS See all modpacks [here](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/finder?included_mods=69806). ![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_discord.webp) The best and fastest way to get replies is to join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/S5nffJbuvA). [![BHsponser](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MMV_Moogs_Missing_Villages/MP_MMV_MoogsMissingVillages_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/moogsmods?r=mrmmv)
